backstory.original: Clumsy but well-meaning, Egbert the Dragonborn Paladin was summarily booted out of his Paladin order after a terrible incident he doesn't like to talk about. Setting out on his quest for atonement with a new deity in tow, La Vache Mauve, he falls in with the Oxventurers Guild and, by his reckoning, questing with them offers as good a chance as any of guiding him towards absolution. Often impulsive, he very rarely plans beyond his initial moment of 'inspiration' but his heart's in the right place. Well, at least until he next rushes into battle, trips into a spike pit and ends up kebabbed on a skewer...
backstory.display: 在发生了一件他自己不愿提及的可怕事件之后，笨拙但心地善良的龙裔圣武士艾伯特被立即撵出了圣武士团。在展开赎罪旅程，跟随一个全新神祗“紫色牛”的同时，他进入了公牛冒险公会；按照他的期望，和公会成员一同进行任务是个不错的机会，能够引导着他获得赦免。常常很冲动的他鲜有超出自己最初“灵感所致”的行为，但他的心地是善良的。嗯，至少在他下次闯进战场、踏进带刺陷坑，被穿成肉串为止吧...

description.original: Egbert throws a bomb at the nearest enemy, dealing damage and knocking back enemies in a small area.
description.display: 艾伯特向最近的敌人投出一枚炸弹，造成伤害并击退一小块区域内的敌人。

description.original: Radiant light shines out from behind La Vache Mauve dealing damage to enemies and increasing Champion damage by 1000% for 20 seconds.
description.display: 从紫色牛背后射出耀眼光辉，对复数敌人造成伤害，同时提升勇士伤害 1000%，持续 20 秒。

longDescription.original: Clouds come down from the top of the screen and part, revealing the head of La Vache Mauve. Radiant light shines out from behind La Vache Mauve's head and illuminates the area. Enemies take ultimate damage, and the Champions deal 1000% more damage for 20 seconds.
longDescription.display: 从画面顶部坠下云雾并分开，显露紫色牛的头部。从紫色牛的头部后方射出耀眼光辉，照亮区域。敌人会受到杀招伤害，且勇士可造成额外 1000% 伤害，持续 20 秒。

description.original: Egbert is most powerful by associating exclusively with Champions from one side of the Lawful/Chaotic axis
description.display: 艾伯特擅长与守序/混沌轴上一侧的勇士进行专属协同

description.pre: $(source_hero) has a number of Atonement points equal to the number of Lawful Champions in the formation minus the number of Chaotic Champions in the formation, not including $(source_hero) himself. $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions behind him by $(not_buffed amount___2)% multiplied by the number of Atonement points he has squared.
$(source_hero)的赎罪点数等于阵型中守序勇士的数量减去阵型中混乱勇士的数量，但$(source_hero)本身除外。$(source_hero)为自身后方所有勇士提升 $(not_buffed amount___2)% 乘以其自身赎罪点数的平方。

tipText.original: Egbert buffs Champion damage based on the number of Lawful or Chaotic Champions in the formation, focus on one end of the axis to maximize this bonus.
tipText.display: 艾伯特根据阵型中守序或混乱勇士的数量增幅勇士的伤害，着重轴向的一侧可令此增益最大化。

conditions.desc: After $(source_hero) makes a base attack, if there is a Champion below $(health_precent_threshold)% hit points (including himself), he heals the two most damaged Champions for $amount multiplied by the absolute value of the number of Atonement points he has.

After $(source_hero) makes a base attack, if there is a Champion below $(health_precent_threshold)% hit points (including himself), he heals the most damaged Champion for $amount multiplied by the absolute value of the number of Atonement points he has.
$(source_hero)进行基本攻击后，如有勇士生命值低于 $(health_precent_threshold)% （包括其自身），则会为两名受伤最重的勇士进行治疗，治疗数值为 $amount 乘以所持赎罪点数的绝对值。
$(source_hero)进行基本攻击后，如有勇士生命值低于 $(health_precent_threshold)% （包括其自身），则会为受伤最重的勇士进行治疗，治疗数值为 $amount 乘以所持赎罪点数的绝对值。

tipText.original: Egbert heals the most damage Champion after each attack based on the absolute value of Atonement Points
tipText.display: 艾伯特在每次攻击后对受损最严重的勇士施加治疗，数值根据赎罪点数的绝对值而定

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of his max health multiplied by the absolute value of the number of Atonement points he has.
$(source_hero)提升其他所有勇士的最大生命值，数值相当于他自身最大生命值的 $(amount)% 乘以所拥有赎罪点数的绝对值。
$(source_hero) increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)% for each enemy on the screen and each point of enemy/boss enrage, stacking additively and then applying multiplicatively.
$(source_hero)每被一名敌人攻击或获得一层来自敌人/首领的怒气堆叠，即提升$(upgrade_name id)的效果 $(amount)%。以加算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式生效。
$(source_hero) increases the global gold find by $(not_buffed amount)% multiplied by the absolute value of the number of Atonement points he has.
$(source_hero)提升整体金币获取 $(not_buffed amount)% 乘以所拥有赎罪点数的绝对值。
The number of Neutral (Lawful/Chaotic axis) Champions in the formation is added to $(source_hero)'s Atonement points.
根据阵型中中立（守序/混沌轴）勇士的数量追加至$(source_hero)的赎罪点数。

specializationDescription.original: Egbert focuses on his Atonement for his past
specializationDescription.display: 艾伯特专心为自己的过去赎罪

description.desc: The number of Neutral (Lawful/Chaotic axis) Champions in the formation is subtracted from $(source_hero)'s Atonement points.
根据阵型中中立（守序/混沌轴）勇士的数量从$(source_hero)的赎罪点数中扣除。

specializationDescription.original: Egbert gives in a little to his chaotic nature
specializationDescription.display: 艾伯特对自己的混乱本性作出了些许退让

description.desc: $(source_hero) gains the Debuff Role and their bombs now also create smoke clouds that last for $(duration) seconds. Enemies in one or more smoke clouds take an additional $(amount)% damage from attacks, and have a $(miss_chance)% chance to miss with their attack.
$(source_hero)获得“减益”角色定位，并且其炸弹现在也可以产生持续 $(duration) 秒的烟雾。一片或多片烟雾中的敌人会承受额外的 $(amount)% 攻击伤害，并有 $(miss_chance)% 几率攻击落空。

specializationDescription.original: Egbert adds some smoke to his bombs
specializationDescription.display: 艾伯特为自己的炸弹添加了些许辛辣

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s $(upgrade_name id) targets the two most damaged Champions and the amount of healing is increased by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)的$(upgrade_name id)会以两个受到最重伤害的勇士为目标，且治疗量增加 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Egbert focuses on his healing hands
specializationDescription.display: 艾伯特专注于自己的治疗手腕

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Oxventures affiliation member in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位公牛冒险公会从属组织成员，$(source_hero)即会将$(upgrade_name id)的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，效果叠加乘算。

specializationDescription.original: Egbert knows gold is crucial for adventuring
specializationDescription.display: 艾伯特知道，金币是冒险的关键

description.original: The best way to use a bomb is to just light it and see what happens.
description.display: 使用炸弹的最好办法就是 - 点燃它，看看会发生什么。

description.original: I appointed myself vice-leader, but I was overruled.
description.display: 我任命我自己为副领袖，但我被推翻了。

description.original: Pay no attention to the ostentatious vomiting! I have this!
description.display: 不要在意夸张的呕吐！我有这个！

description.original: I've come close to death a few times, don't recommend it.
description.display: 我已经迫近死亡好几次了，我可不推荐。

description.original: There's a large element of luck to everything I do, really.
description.display: 我做什么都有很大一部分运气因素，真的。

description.original: My quest for atonement led me to La Vache Mauve.
description.display: 我的赎罪之旅让我遇到了“紫色牛”。

description.original: In the name of La Vache Mauve!
description.display: 以紫色牛之名！

description.original: Terribly sorry! Don't mind me!
description.display: 非常抱歉！别管我！

description.original: What's the worst that could happen?
description.display: 可能发生的最坏情况是什么？

description.original: At least I won't put this gold in a lake!
description.display: 至少我不会把这黄金丢进湖里！

description.original: The best tool for a paladin in a fight is a nice melee weapon.
description.display: 对圣武士来说，最好的战斗用具就是绝佳的近战武器。

description.original: Actually, I'm very bad in a panic. Sorry.
description.display: 实际上，我很害怕恐慌。抱歉。

description.original: What should we spend it on?
description.display: 我们应该用在哪里？

description.original: It works! I think...
description.display: 成功了！我想想......

description.original: Experimenting with explosives is a dangerous art.
description.display: 做爆炸物的实验可是危险的艺术。

description.original: Little fire breath on this end here, and instant fireworks display!
description.display: 在这边小小喷上一口火焰，立即就能看到漂亮的焰火展示！

description.original: I'm saving this for a special occasion.
description.display: 我要把这个留下来，拿来应对特别情况。

description.original: I found this...steed. I don't know if it will carry me.
description.display: 我找到了... 这匹马。我不知道它愿不愿意驼我。

description.original: Pigs are intelligent and therefore easily scared by explosions.
description.display: 猪是聪明的动物，因此很容易会被爆炸吓倒。

description.original: Who's a good boy? Who's a good fiend in the shape of a dog?
description.display: 好狗狗是谁呀？是哪个炼狱生物变成了狗狗的形貌？

description.original: This is a very impressive steed! Antlers are nature's handlebars!
description.display: 这还真是够神骏！鹿角就是天然的把手！

description.original: The best shield is thick enough to stop a mace AND to slide down a mountain on!
description.display: 最好的盾牌厚实无比，足以挡住狼牙棒，还能拿来从山上顺坡而下！

description.original: It's both a shield and a bomb powered ejector seat!
description.display: 既是盾牌，也是炸弹动力弹射椅！

description.original: Good for blocking attacks and checking if any of your lunch is stuck in your teeth!
description.display: 能够拿来阻挡攻击，也能拿来看看午餐的菜是不是藏在牙缝里了！

description.original: Atonement requires reflection. I think this will work.
description.display: 赎罪需要反射。我觉得这能奏效。

description.original: When you're too close to safely throw a bomb, a mace is the way to go.
description.display: 距离太近不好丢炸弹的时候，钉头槌就是解决之道。

description.original: Heavy, deadly, and tastes of raspberries!
description.display: 沉重致命，还带着树莓的味道！

description.original: When I hit someone, sometimes they turn into an animal friend!
description.display: 击中的时候，目标就会变成动物伙伴！

description.original: Gaze at the beautiful glow as I clonk you and possibly turn you into a squirrel.
description.display: 看着我砸向你的一击发出的美丽光芒，很有可能你会由此变成一只小松鼠。

description.original: How many of these do you think I can fit in my mouth?
description.display: 你觉得我嘴里能塞上多少这玩意？

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Egbert's second Specializations by $amount%

description.original: They're too delicious to just eat sixty.
description.display: 太美味了，只吃六十个怎么够。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Egbert's second Specializations by $amount%

description.original: My seal friend is particularly fond of these.
description.display: 我的海豹朋友尤其喜欢。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Egbert's second Specializations by $amount%

name.original: Pork Spear in a Bread Cradle
name.display: 面包摇篮里的猪肉长矛

description.original: What else would you call it?
description.display: 不然还能怎么叫？

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Egbert's second Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Can I offer you a pamphlet?
description.display: 愿意收下这份宣传册吗？

description.original: There will be chips and dip at the first meeting.
description.display: 一见如故。

description.original: Would you like to join a new religion? We worship a purple sky cow. Great perks and benefits.
description.display: 想要皈依新的信仰吗？我们崇拜一头紫色的天空母牛。提供绝佳的天赋和福利哟。

description.original: My quest for absolution can be yours too! It's not a pyramid scheme, I promise.
description.display: 我的赎罪旅程，你也可以一样拥有！我保证这不是传销。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Dragonborn Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 15 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Good Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Clumsy but well-meaning, Egbert the Dragonborn Paladin was summarily booted out of his Paladin order after a terrible incident he doesn't like to talk about. Setting out on his quest for atonement with a new deity in tow, La Vache Mauve, he falls in with the Oxventurers Guild and, by his reckoning, questing with them offers as good a chance as any of guiding him towards absolution. Often impulsive, he very rarely plans beyond his initial moment of 'inspiration' but his heart's in the right place. Well, at least until he next rushes into battle, trips into a spike pit and ends up kebabbed on a skewer...
character_sheet_details.system_description: Egbert is a Tanking Support Champion who buffs the damage of Champions behind them

event_upgrades.name: Atone for the Past
event_upgrades.description: Egbert is most powerful by associating exclusively with Champions from one side of the Lawful/Chaotic axis

character_sheet_details.backstory: 在发生了一件他自己不愿提及的可怕事件之后，笨拙但心地善良的龙裔圣武士艾伯特被立即撵出了圣武士团。在展开赎罪旅程，跟随一个全新神祗“紫色牛”的同时，他进入了公牛冒险公会；按照他的期望，和公会成员一同进行任务是个不错的机会，能够引导着他获得赦免。常常很冲动的他鲜有超出自己最初“灵感所致”的行为，但他的心地是善良的。嗯，至少在他下次闯进战场、踏进带刺陷坑，被穿成肉串为止吧...
character_sheet_details.system_description: 艾伯特是一个坦克支援勇士，可为其后方的勇士提供伤害增益

event_upgrades.name: 过去的赎罪
event_upgrades.description: 艾伯特擅长与守序/混沌轴上一侧的勇士进行专属协同

display.name: 韧性

display.name: 幸运

display.description: 以紫色牛之名！

original.name: Unnecessary Apology

display.name: 我们开始吧

original.name: Gainful Employment
original.description: At least I won't put this gold in a lake!

display.name: 有利可图的雇用
display.description: 至少我不会把这黄金丢进湖里！

original.name: Defensive Duelist
original.description: The best tool for a paladin in a fight is a nice melee weapon.

display.name: 防守型决斗者
display.description: 对圣武士来说，最好的战斗用具就是绝佳的近战武器。

original.name: Calm Under Pressure

display.name: 从容应对
display.description: 实际上，我很害怕恐慌。抱歉。

original.name: Holiest Hand Grenade

display.name: 最神圣的手榴弹
display.description: 我要把这个留下来，拿来应对特别情况。

original.name: This Little Piggy...
original.description: I found this...steed. I don't know if it will carry me.

display.name: 这头小猪...
display.description: 我找到了... 这匹马。我不知道它愿不愿意驼我。

original.name: Pig-bert

display.name: 猪伯特
display.description: 猪是聪明的动物，因此很容易会被爆炸吓倒。

original.name: Dog-bert
original.description: Who's a good boy? Who's a good fiend in the shape of a dog?

display.name: 狗伯特
display.description: 好狗狗是谁呀？是哪个炼狱生物变成了狗狗的形貌？

original.name: Elk-bert
original.description: This is a very impressive steed! Antlers are nature's handlebars!

display.name: 鹿伯特
display.description: 这还真是够神骏！鹿角就是天然的把手！

original.name: Steel Defense
original.description: The best shield is thick enough to stop a mace AND to slide down a mountain on!

display.name: 钢铁防御
display.description: 最好的盾牌厚实无比，足以挡住狼牙棒，还能拿来从山上顺坡而下！

original.name: Shield of Protection
original.description: It's both a shield and a bomb powered ejector seat!

display.name: 防护之盾
display.description: 既是盾牌，也是炸弹动力弹射椅！

original.name: Mirrored Shield
original.description: Good for blocking attacks and checking if any of your lunch is stuck in your teeth!

display.name: 镜盾
display.description: 能够拿来阻挡攻击，也能拿来看看午餐的菜是不是藏在牙缝里了！

original.name: Shield of Reflection
original.description: Atonement requires reflection. I think this will work.

display.name: 反射之盾
display.description: 赎罪需要反射。我觉得这能奏效。

original.name: Spiked Mace
original.description: When you're too close to safely throw a bomb, a mace is the way to go.

display.name: 带刺钉头锤
display.description: 距离太近不好丢炸弹的时候，钉头槌就是解决之道。

original.name: Sharp-edged Bludgeon
original.description: Heavy, deadly, and tastes of raspberries!

display.name: 锐缘棒击
display.description: 沉重致命，还带着树莓的味道！

original.name: Cursed Mace
original.description: When I hit someone, sometimes they turn into an animal friend!

display.name: 被诅咒的钉头锤
display.description: 击中的时候，目标就会变成动物伙伴！

original.name: Fancy Cursed Mace
original.description: Gaze at the beautiful glow as I clonk you and possibly turn you into a squirrel.

display.name: 精致的被诅咒钉头锤
display.description: 看着我砸向你的一击发出的美丽光芒，很有可能你会由此变成一只小松鼠。

original.name: Finger Foods
original.description: How many of these do you think I can fit in my mouth?

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Egbert's second Specializations by $amount%

display.name: 小点心
display.description: 你觉得我嘴里能塞上多少这玩意？

effects.description: 使艾伯特所有第二专精的效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Canapes
original.description: They're too delicious to just eat sixty.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Egbert's second Specializations by $amount%

display.name: 开胃小菜
display.description: 太美味了，只吃六十个怎么够。

effects.description: 使艾伯特所有第二专精的效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Scotch Eggs
original.description: My seal friend is particularly fond of these.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Egbert's second Specializations by $amount%

display.name: 苏格兰煮蛋
display.description: 我的海豹朋友尤其喜欢。

effects.description: 使艾伯特所有第二专精的效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Pork Spear in a Bread Cradle
original.description: What else would you call it?

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Egbert's second Specializations by $amount%

display.name: 面包摇篮里的猪肉长矛
display.description: 不然还能怎么叫？

effects.description: 使艾伯特所有第二专精的效果提高 $amount%

original.name: La Vache Mauve Pamphlets
original.description: Can I offer you a pamphlet?

display.name: 紫色牛宣传册
display.description: 愿意收下这份宣传册吗？

original.name: The Good Word
original.description: There will be chips and dip at the first meeting.

display.name: 真善良言
display.description: 一见如故。

original.name: Holy Message
original.description: Would you like to join a new religion? We worship a purple sky cow. Great perks and benefits.

display.name: 上圣真言
display.description: 想要皈依新的信仰吗？我们崇拜一头紫色的天空母牛。提供绝佳的天赋和福利哟。

original.name: Divine Handout
original.description: My quest for absolution can be yours too! It's not a pyramid scheme, I promise.

display.name: 神圣分发
display.description: 我的赎罪旅程，你也可以一样拥有！我保证这不是传销。
